events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Bottom line: flexible cord used as fixed wiring in a classified area is a **fail**, **critical** risk — it's a prohibited ignition source path under NEC 500-516 unless it falls under one of the narrow listed exceptions (with proper extra-hard-usage cord, grounding, and strain-relief fittings), and there's no evidence of required boundary seals either. Immediate actions: stop work, de-energize/LOTO, remove the cord, install an approved raceway method with proper seals, and get engineer/AHJ sign-off before re-energizing.
